notes: David is final year so most undergraduate merit scholarships should be flagged as excluded or near-expired. Agent should redirect to postgraduate entrance scholarships. ss_395 (Innovation and Technology) explicitly requires non-final year so should be excluded.

demo_scenarios.description: Agent proactively flags that most undergraduate merit scholarships exclude final year students — redirects to HKU Business School Dean's Master Fellowship (ss_786) as next step
Case competition submission in 4 days — dissertation final draft due 2 days later — agent flags high risk and suggests completing scholarship application first
HSBC and McKinsey recruiting emails kept in inbox — generic career fair mass mails archived with reason
